JPMC Dashboard

As of 19 March 2026  ·  271,955 sq ft  ·  312 Parking Slots  ·  7 Floors (GF + 3F–9F)
📋 Lease & Commercial Summary ▼

Property & Parties

LicenseeJPMorgan Chase
LicensorCowrks / Kairos
LandlordKairos Properties Pvt Ltd
AssetOne Downtown Central (CRISIL House)
OwnershipBrookfield Platform
UnitGround Floor & 3rd–9th Floors
Centre TypeManaged Office Space (Sub-License)
Agreement TypeLeave & License
StatusUnder Fit-out

Key Dates & Term

Agreement Signed29 Dec 2025
Scheduled Handover / LCD01 April 2026
License Term60 months (5 years)
Renewal Term60 months
Lock-in Period36 months (till 31 Mar 2029)
Term End31 March 2031
Escalation5% every 12 months
Early Access SinceDecember 2025 (utilities only)

Area & Financial Terms

Usable Area2,71,955 sq ft
Carpet Area1,76,771 sq ft
Car Parking Slots312 slots
Security Deposit6 months LF (INR 55.4 Cr)
CAM (Year 1)INR 40 psf (carpet)
OPEX (covered in LF)INR 99.17 psf/month
OPEX Add-onsINR 4.23 psf (incl. 10% DMF)
Extended Hours Rate₹0.25/sq ft/hour
GSTExtra, payable by Licensee

Capex, Fit-out & Protection

Baseline Fit-out CapINR 4,000/sq ft
Fit-out Amortisation108 months (in License Fee)
Additional Fit-outActuals + 10% DMF
Delay PenaltyUp to 6 months LF credit
Grace Period (Delay)30 days from 1 Apr 2026
Abatement ProtectionAlternate premises + fee abatement
Partial SurrenderPost lock-in, full-floor basis
Renewable PowerBest efforts up to 100%
Standard Hours24×5 (Mon–Fri)
License Fee & Revenue Schedule (Monthly, INR) 10-Year Projection
Component Year 1Year 2Year 3Year 4Year 5 Year 6Year 7Year 8Year 9Year 10
Revenue psf (carpet)522548576605635666700735772716

Bldg Rent psf (carpet)220231243255267281295310325341
CAM psf (carpet)40424446495154565962
OPEX psf (carpet)99104109115121127133140147154
